validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{ count }} characters.
validation.passwordPattern: Include an uppercase letter, number, and special character.

errors.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.

forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email and we will send password reset instructions if an account exists.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for {{ email }}, reset instructions have been sent.

errors.sendFailed: We could not send reset instructions right now. Please try again.

development.title: Development reset details
development.description: The API returned local testing details. Use the link or token below to complete the reset flow.

resetPassword.intro: Enter the reset token from your email and choose a new password. Reset links expire after two hours.
resetPassword.complete: Your password has been reset. Existing sessions for this account have been signed out.

errors.invalidOrExpired: This reset link is invalid or expired. Request a new reset link and try again.
